objective: Create the planning package for epic #507, Secret Provisioning UX and no-secret evidence contract, before implementation begins.
scope_boundary: Planning-only child issue #508 for governance epic #507.
Allowed writes are limited to the PDCAR, structured plan, planning execution scope, issue graph validation artifact, and OVERLORD_BACKLOG.md mirror row.
No implementation changes to standards, deploy gates, validators, runbooks, workflows, or downstream repos in this lane.
out_of_scope: Implementing STANDARDS.md or docs/ENV_REGISTRY.md changes; those belong to issue #509.
Adding or changing CI/local validators; that belongs to issue #510.
Changing Pages deploy gate code or tests; that belongs to issue #511.
Scrubbing runbooks; that belongs to issue #512.
Mutating HealthcarePlatform, ai-integration-services, seek-and-ponder, Stampede, or any other downstream repo; downstream work requires its own issue and lane.
research_summary: Three research agents inspected the governance repo and adjacent deployment precedents. The standards insertion scan recommended adding Secret Provisioning UX before Security Standards in STANDARDS.md and a Provisioning UX Contract in docs/ENV_REGISTRY.md, then hardening Pages deploy gate missing-secret output and runbooks. The deploy/secret precedent scan found that docs/ENV_REGISTRY.md and scripts/bootstrap-repo-env.sh already establish .env.shared as the gitignored local SSOT parsed as data, while Pages deploy and multiple downstream runbooks still need no-inline-secret guidance. The issue-conventions scan recommended epic #507 plus child issues #508-#513, with this #508 lane limited to PDCAR, structured plan, execution scope, and backlog mirror.

sprints.name: Sprint 0 - Planning package (issue #508)
sprints.goal: Land the canonical planning artifacts and issue-backed backlog mirror for epic #507 without starting implementation.
tasks: Create the PDCAR artifact for epic #507 and planning issue #508.
Create the structured-agent-cycle plan with issue_number 508 so governance-surface validators can bind it to the current issue branch.
Create a planning_only execution scope with lane_claim issue_number 508 and a narrow allowed_write_paths list.
Record issue graph evidence for epic #507 and child issues #508-#513.
Add an In Progress backlog mirror row for epic #507.
acceptance_criteria: Structured plan exists at docs/plans/issue-507-secret-provisioning-ux-structured-agent-cycle-plan.json and validates against docs/schemas/structured-agent-cycle-plan.schema.json.

Planning execution scope exists at raw/execution-scopes/2026-04-21-issue-508-secret-provisioning-ux-planning.json, uses execution_mode planning_only, and limits allowed_write_paths to planning, backlog mirror, and issue-link artifacts.
Plan includes findings from standards insertion, deploy-secret precedent, and issue-convention research agents.
Plan forbids committing .env.shared, generated .env* files, raw provider tokens, raw phone numbers, signed URLs, Authorization headers, or screenshots containing credentials.
OVERLORD_BACKLOG.md references open epic #507 and the child issue map after GitHub issues exist.

sprints.name: Sprint 1 - Standards contract (issue #509)
sprints.goal: Define the canonical Secret Provisioning UX rule for all governed repos.
tasks: Add Secret Provisioning UX to STANDARDS.md before the Security Standards section.
Add a Provisioning UX Contract to docs/ENV_REGISTRY.md that points to approved stores and name-only missing-secret wording.
Document approved surfaces for local .env.shared, generated ignored repo env files, provider vaults, and GitHub Actions secrets.
acceptance_criteria: Missing-secret diagnostics are required to list variable names only.
Inline secret export commands, token placeholders, raw values, Authorization headers, signed URLs, raw phone numbers, and credential-bearing screenshots are explicitly prohibited as evidence.
Approved provisioning paths are documented without exposing values.

sprints.name: Sprint 2 - No-secret evidence validator (issue #510)
sprints.goal: Add a local and CI validation path that rejects unsafe provisioning evidence.
tasks: Add validator coverage for token-like strings, JWT fragments, Authorization headers, signed URLs, raw phone numbers, and generated env files in provisioning evidence.
Wire the validator into the appropriate local-ci or governance-check profile.
Add focused tests proving safe variable-name-only guidance passes and unsafe evidence fails.
acceptance_criteria: Unsafe provisioning evidence fails locally and in CI.
Safe missing-secret messages that list names only and point to approved stores pass.
Validator output never prints secret values.

sprints.name: Sprint 3 - Pages deploy gate UX (issue #511)
sprints.goal: Harden the Cloudflare Pages deploy gate missing-secret path as the first concrete deploy UX proof.
tasks: Update Pages deploy gate missing-environment output to point to approved provisioning paths.
Extend tests for absent token, absent account id, and approval gate messaging.
acceptance_criteria: Pages deploy gate missing-secret failures do not include inline export commands.
Output identifies absent variable names only and routes operators to approved provisioning docs.
Tests prove no token-shaped or credential-shaped value is emitted.

sprints.name: Sprint 4 - Runbook scrub and rollout inventory (issues #512 and #513)
sprints.goal: Remove unsafe inline provisioning guidance from governance docs and route downstream gaps without mutating downstream repos.
tasks: Scrub governance runbooks for inline secret export, source, echo, or clipboard-based credential guidance.
Inventory governed downstream repos for missing-secret UX gaps.
Classify each repo as adopted, blocked, not applicable, or follow-up required, and create linked issues for residual gaps.
acceptance_criteria: Governance runbooks no longer direct operators to paste or inline-export secret values.
Downstream inventory is recorded with issue links for every required follow-up.
No downstream repo is mutated from this governance lane.

specialist_reviews.focus: Where to insert Secret Provisioning UX in standards, env registry, deploy gate docs, and runbooks.
specialist_reviews.summary: Recommended STANDARDS.md before Security Standards, docs/ENV_REGISTRY.md Provisioning UX Contract, Pages deploy gate output/tests, and scrub targets across remote MCP and external services docs.

specialist_reviews.focus: Existing .env.shared bootstrap contract, Pages deploy gate behavior, and downstream unsafe guidance patterns.
specialist_reviews.summary: Found strong .env.shared and bootstrap precedent in governance, plus Pages deploy, runbook, and downstream follow-up areas that should be routed through child issues.

specialist_reviews.focus: Epic/child issue naming, labels, acceptance criteria, and planning artifact expectations.
specialist_reviews.summary: Recommended epic #507 plus child issues #508-#513, planning-only #508 artifacts, and detailed acceptance criteria for implementation lanes.

alternate_model_review.summary: This lane only creates planning artifacts and issue/backlog mirrors. Implementation lanes that change standards, validators, deploy gates, or downstream contracts should request review according to their tier and blast radius.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Commit the planning-only #508 package for epic #507: PDCAR, structured plan, planning execution scope, issue graph validation artifact, and OVERLORD_BACKLOG.md mirror row. The execution scope remains planning_only and no implementation files are authorized in this lane.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Review and merge #508 planning package, then start #509 standards contract or #511 Pages deploy gate UX under separate issue-backed lanes.
handoff_acceptance_criteria: PDCAR, structured plan, execution scope, validation artifact, and backlog mirror exist.
Execution scope validates with lane claim.

material_deviation_rules: If implementation is required, stop #508 and open or use the appropriate child issue before writing implementation files.

If any evidence would include a credential value, signed URL, Authorization header, raw phone number, generated env file, or screenshot containing credentials, replace it with redacted structured evidence before commit.
If a downstream repo requires mutation, create and claim a downstream repo issue/lane before any write.
If missing-secret UX needs provider-specific instructions, document variable names and approved stores only; do not include inline export commands or token placeholders.
